title: [CI:DOCS] Change example target to default in doc
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note None
None
```

comments.body:
This changes the example document to use `default.target` instead of multi-user. The reason for this is that default is almost certainly multi-user for the root case, and multi-user is incorrect (and in fact fails) in the user case.

This allows the same .container file to be used rootfully or not
